title: Mexican Street Empanada
description: A crispy, savory pastry filled with spicy beef and onions, perfect for snacking on the go.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Once the beef is browned, add the chopped onion and minced garlic. Cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in cumin and chili powder. Cook for 1 minute.
Roll out the empanada dough according to package instructions.
Spoon a tablespoon or two of the beef mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half to form a triangle or a square shape, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little bit of water and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
